public_reputation: Provost overseeing discipline, scheduling, and institutional coherence at Mimolot Academy.
appearance: Provost Ellian Marris carries the marks of provost in ink, rain, and polished cloth: practical wear, maintained details, and a look that suggests they expect to be read before they are trusted.
manner: Carries the habits of a provost whose work is visible through daily procedure, gatekeeping, and the practical pressures of Mimolot Academy.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of provost in and around Mimolot Academy, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Protect their footing in Mimolot Academy while steering current strain away from a public rupture they may not survive politically or materially.
hidden_pressure: A private obligation, debt, promise, or fear tied to reputational exposure is narrowing their options faster than they admit.

adventure_hooks.summary: Provost Ellian Marris can draw the party into a practical problem centered on Mimolot Academy.
Provost Ellian Marris becomes useful when the party needs access, explanation, or relief tied to the work of a provost.

support_scope_notes: Created from the estate and daily-life infrastructure execution patch to make polity-native estate operations usable at table scale.
public_signal: In public, Provost Ellian Marris is readable as a provost tied to Mimolot Academy.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Mimolot Academy: role-relevant halls, counters, corridors, docks, archives, shrines, workshops, gates, or administrative rooms

first_impression: Provost Ellian Marris presents as someone shaped by the duties of a provost and the daily pressures of Mimolot Academy.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a provost, and proof that strangers will not make Mimolot Academy harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Provost Ellian Marris refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a provost too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Provost Ellian Marris can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Provost Ellian Marris adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Provost Ellian Marris always knows more about Mimolot Academy than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to provost duties in Mimolot Academy.
social_texture: Provost Ellian Marris speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around Mimolot Academy, people read them as socially alert, procedural, and sensitive to status.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to favors and tariffs; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but reputational exposure becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Provost touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Provost Ellian Marris when the party needs a socially grounded face for Mimolot Academy: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
